field_notes.fixture: Uses the official STREAM_CODEC decode path with entity id and the official SWING_MAIN_HAND action constant, then re-encodes through the official Play clientbound protocol codec. This avoids initialized Entity, Level, and game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound animate packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official STREAM_CODEC decode fixture with entity id 123 and SWING_MAIN_HAND only; do not infer entity existence, animation semantics, initialized Entity/Level behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
